title: How to Get Current and Historical Status Distribution Report in monday.com

posts.author: kkovriga (Katerina Kovriga)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’ve ever needed to understand how work is distributed across statuses in monday.com - both now and over time - this two-minute how-to guide might help.

We cover:
• Native Chart setup for current status distribution
• Using Smart Spreadsheet for more flexible reporting
• A simple way to track historical status distribution using automated XLS snapshots

It’s a practical approach if you’re looking to improve workflow visibility without heavy setup.

Would love to hear how others handle historical reporting in monday

Full guide: Two-Minute How-To: Getting Current and Historical Status Distribution in monday.com - Stiltsoft
Video version: https://youtu.be/KwGecoC_ZEM
